title: Sprout
descriptionModifier: This is an early-form Katchimera: clearer, smaller, and easier to befriend.
quoteModifier: Beginnings count even before they look impressive.
visualModifier: simpler silhouette, fewer secondary details, approachable proportions, clear readable shape
promptModifier: sprout stage, simpler form, younger and more approachable, cleaner silhouette, restrained detailing

title: Shaped
descriptionModifier: This line has started to deepen through repetition and stronger behavioral identity.
quoteModifier: What repeats begins to define you.
visualModifier: clear secondary forms, richer markings, stronger habitat expression, more confident posture
promptModifier: shaped stage, evolved secondary form, richer markings, stronger habitat integration, more confident silhouette

title: Ascended
descriptionModifier: This is a mature Katchimera line formed through strong fit, repetition, or unusual conditions.
quoteModifier: Depth arrives when pattern turns into identity.
visualModifier: majestic silhouette, full aura expression, signature habitat motifs, elevated detailing
promptModifier: ascended stage, majestic evolved form, elevated aura, premium detailing, signature habitat motifs fully expressed
